name: Alanine
tRNA_info: Recognized by Alanyl-tRNA synthetase via the unique G3:U70 wobble base pair in the acceptor stem.

name: Arginine
tRNA_info: Recognized by Arginyl-tRNA synthetase via the anticodon and the discriminator base A73.

name: Asparagine
tRNA_info: Recognized by Asparaginyl-tRNA synthetase via the anticodon and the discriminator base G73.

name: Aspartic acid
tRNA_info: Recognized by Aspartyl-tRNA synthetase via the anticodon and the discriminator base G73.

name: Cysteine
tRNA_info: Recognized by Cysteinyl-tRNA synthetase via the anticodon and G73; utilizes a zinc-binding site.

name: Glutamine
tRNA_info: Recognized by Glutaminyl-tRNA synthetase via the anticodon and U1:G72 in the acceptor stem.

name: Glutamic acid
tRNA_info: Recognized by Glutamyl-tRNA synthetase via the anticodon and G73; binding involves a major conformational change.

name: Glycine
tRNA_info: Recognized by Glycyl-tRNA synthetase via the anticodon and the acceptor stem.

name: Histidine
tRNA_info: Recognized by Histidyl-tRNA synthetase via the unique G-1:C73 base pair in the acceptor stem.

name: Isoleucine
tRNA_info: Recognized by Isoleucyl-tRNA synthetase via the anticodon; includes a pre-transfer editing site for Val discrimination.

name: Leucine
tRNA_info: Recognized by Leucyl-tRNA synthetase via the long variable loop and the acceptor stem.

name: Lysine
tRNA_info: Recognized by Lysyl-tRNA synthetase via the anticodon and the acceptor stem; Class II in most organisms (some Archaea use Class I).

name: Methionine
tRNA_info: Recognized by Methionyl-tRNA synthetase via the anticodon and the discriminator base A73.

name: Phenylalanine
tRNA_info: Recognized by Phenylalanyl-tRNA synthetase; an exception as a Class II enzyme that acylates the 2'-OH and is a heterotetramer.

name: Proline
tRNA_info: Recognized by Prolyl-tRNA synthetase via the anticodon and the discriminator base G73.

name: Serine
tRNA_info: Recognized by Seryl-tRNA synthetase primarily via the long variable loop of tRNA-Ser.

name: Threonine
tRNA_info: Recognized by Threonyl-tRNA synthetase via the anticodon and the discriminator base G73.

name: Tryptophan
tRNA_info: Recognized by Tryptophanyl-tRNA synthetase via the anticodon and the discriminator base A73.

name: Tyrosine
tRNA_info: Recognized by Tyrosyl-tRNA synthetase via the anticodon and the discriminator base A73.

name: Valine
tRNA_info: Recognized by Valyl-tRNA synthetase via the anticodon and the discriminator base A73.

name: Selenocysteine
tRNA_info: Synthesized by Seryl-tRNA synthetase (Class II) as Ser-tRNA^Sec, followed by conversion to Sec-tRNA^Sec.
